Part.Source:
WWP_Logger.Debug(Format(!"TrnMode: %1 - %2, GAMUser: %3", &TrnMode, TrnMode.EnumerationDescription(&TrnMode), &GAMUser.ToJsonString()), &Pgmname) do case case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Insert &WWP_UserExtended = new() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedId = &GAMUser.GUID &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedName = &GAMUser.Name.TrimEnd() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedFullName = &GAMUser.FirstName.TrimEnd() + iif(&GAMUser.FirstName.TrimEnd().IsEmpty() or &GAMUser.LastName.TrimEnd().IsEmpty(), !"", !" ") + &GAMUser.LastName.TrimEnd() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedEmail = iif(&GAMUser.EMail.TrimEnd() <> "admin", &GAMUser.EMail.TrimEnd(), "") &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedPhone = &GAMUser.Phone.TrimEnd()
&WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedDesktopNotif = True &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedEmaiNotif = True &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedSMSNotif = True &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedMobileNotif = True &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedDeleted = &GAMUser.IsDeleted if &GAMUser.IsDeleted &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedDeletedIn = ServerNow() else &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedDeletedIn.SetNull() endif &WWP_UserExtended.Save() if not &WWP_UserExtended.Success() &Messages = &WWP_UserExtended.GetMessages() endif case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Update &WWP_UserExtended.Load(&GAMUser.GUID) if &WWP_UserExtended.Fail() &WWP_UserExtended = new() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedId = &GAMUser.GUID endif
&WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedName = &GAMUser.Name.TrimEnd() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedFullName = &GAMUser.FirstName.TrimEnd() + iif(&GAMUser.FirstName.TrimEnd().IsEmpty() or &GAMUser.LastName.TrimEnd().IsEmpty(), !"", !" ") + &GAMUser.LastName.TrimEnd() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedEmail = iif(&GAMUser.EMail.TrimEnd() <> "admin", &GAMUser.EMail.TrimEnd(), "") &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedPhone = &GAMUser.Phone.TrimEnd()
&WWP_UserExtended.Save() if not &WWP_UserExtended.Success() &Messages = &WWP_UserExtended.GetMessages() endif case &TrnMode = TrnMode.Delete &WWP_UserExtended.Load(&GAMUser.GUID) if &WWP_UserExtended.Success() &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedDeleted = true &WWP_UserExtended.WWPUserExtendedDeletedIn = ServerNow() &WWP_UserExtended.Save() if not &WWP_UserExtended.Success() &Messages = &WWP_UserExtended.GetMessages() endif else &Messages = &WWP_UserExtended.GetMessages() endif endcase if &Messages.Count > 0 WWP_Logger.Error(Format(!"TrnMode: %1 - %2, GAMUser: %3, Messages %4", &TrnMode, TrnMode.EnumerationDescription(&TrnMode), &GAMUser.ToJsonString(), &Messages.ToJson()), &Pgmname) endif
